_description: Tier 2 source of truth for the three default programs (mt_write / mt_bus_receive / mt_bus_send) that every model.table root (0,0,0) must carry. Loaded by runtime._seedDefaultRootScaffold on createModel. The model_id field is intentionally omitted; runtime injects the actual model id at seed time. 0324 introduces mt_write with full implementation; mt_bus_receive / mt_bus_send carry skeleton bodies to be filled by 0326.
